description: Leading digital strategy and creative direction for 6+ clients, overseeing ₹15L+ in ad spend across Meta and Google. Producing commercials, brand films, and music videos for India's leading agencies and brands.
Producing shoots for Sprite, HUL, Fossil, Armani Exchange, and Tanishq — managing end-to-end production across celebrity campaigns and brand commercials.
Managing ad-film production and direction at VMLY&R–WPP, including the 12-shoot Lakmé India DIY campaign.
Conceptualizing and executing social campaigns for a diverse client roster across industries.
Supporting campaign analysis and artist database management at Hungama.
